'''Larad Noon''' was one of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun's]] followers during the [[Old Sith Wars]]. When the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] were defeated he fled to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Susevfi]] where he discovered the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]-resistant [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] and crafted a suit of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] from it, convinced that the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] would one day follow him there. They never did, and he spent the last of his lonely days in philosophical musings about [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], good and evil and his own dark deeds. The result was a journal that was discovered nearly 4,000 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later by the [[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]], who incorporated much of his ideas of [[Jiaasjen|"integrating the shadow"]] into their own teachings.
